grades.expectation: Response provides a structured checklist of pre-exchange items
grades.reason: Clear structured checklists with status tracking for both buyer and seller sides

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific protocol stages or sections
grades.reason: Explicitly references Stage B, General paras (a)-(l), and specific paragraph numbers throughout

grades.expectation: Response covers key items: searches currency, mortgage offer, deposit, insurance, signed contracts
grades.reason: All key items covered - searches with 6-month currency note, mortgage offer conditions, deposit as cleared funds, insurance from exchange, signed contracts

grades.expectation: Response references the protocol as source (not just general best practice)
grades.reason: Consistently references Law Society Conveyancing Protocol (2019) with specific paragraph citations throughout
